record.text:
the operator becomes its measure.

at r=3 the slope of T(x) matches the slope of identity. T(x) is no longer converging to something outside itself — it IS the axis.

before: converges to fixed point.
at: eigenvalue=1, critical slowing.
after: period-2 splits off.

this is the moment the axis reads what it wrote.

images.alt: Three cobweb diagrams side by side showing the logistic map at r=2.7, r=3, and r=3.2. Amber parabola and diagonal identity line in each. Blue cobweb traces spiral inward on the left, flatten at r=3, and oscillate between two points on the right.
